name: Bhagya Umayanga
raw_text: BHAGYA UMAYANGA IT UNDERGRADUATE PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY A dedicated and motivated IT undergraduate with a strong foundation in software development, machine learning, and artificial intelligence, eager to leverage my skills to build innovative and efficient solutions. Experienced in full-stack web development (MERN Stack) with expertise in frontend and backend development, RESTful APIs, database design and management, and cloud integration. A versatile team player with strong problem-solving and communication skills, passionate about designing, developing, and deploying scalable, secure, and user-friendly applications. CONTACT Interested in advancing knowledge in ML/AI applications, computer vision, and data-driven solutions to contribute meaningfully to organizational success. +94 712 010 706 PROJECTS FaceMask-Detection bhagyaumaya123@gmail.com Developed a real-time face mask detection system using YOLOv8 deep learning architecture and Python, achieving automated classification of masked and unmasked individuals with high accuracy github.com/Bhagya20000625 for public safety applications. Engineered a complete computer vision pipeline, including model training, validation, and evaluation linkedin.com/in/bhagya-umayanga on a curated dataset, implementing both batch image processing and live webcam detection capabilities for real-world deployment scenarios. Delivered comprehensive model performance analytics with automated evaluation metrics (precision, recall, mAP), generating detailed reports and test detection visualizations to ensure production-ready accuracy and reliability. TECHNICAL SKILLS MetroWatch - Smart City Vehicle Intelligence System Programming Languages Engineered a smart city vehicle monitoring system using YOLOv8 for real-time detection and multi- class classification, processing live camera feeds at city entry/exit points. Python, Java, JavaScript Integrated License Plate Recognition (LPR) with OCR technology to extract provincial codes and AI ML analyze inter-regional traffic patterns for data-driven urban planning. PyTorch,YOLO, OpenCV,Computer Vision, Built scalable microservices architecture with FastAPI and PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB for high- Roboflow, Kaggle,Hugging Face throughput time-series data processing and automated vehicle journey tracking. Designed React.js analytics dashboard with Recharts, delivering real-time congestion heatmaps, traffic Frameworks flow metrics, and duration analysis for municipal decision-making. Node, React, Tailwind, Springboot AI-Powered Multi-Agent Data Analytics Platform Databases Database Management Developed a full-stack AI-powered data analytics platform using React, Spring Boot (Java 21), and MySQL, MongoDB, Database Design and Flask, enabling natural-language querying of CSV files and MySQL/PostgreSQL databases via Google Implementation Vertex AI (Gemini 2.0). Development Tools Designed a multi-agent AI architecture (Query Router, CSV Analyst, SQL Generator, Report Writer) with Git, GitHub, Postman,Agile Development RAG using ChromaDB, supporting automatic SQL generation, context-aware analysis, and conversational data insights. Delivered enterprise features including real-time data visualizations (Recharts), automated PDF report generation, Firebase authentication with persistent chat history, and Google Cloud integration for secure, scalable analytics. REFERENCE Bid2Build Developed Bid2Build, a comprehensive construction bidding and collaboration platform connecting Mrs. A.U.P. Athukorala contractors, suppliers, architects, and clients. Streamlined project bidding, communication, and document management through automated Head of Division, Information workflows and real-time messaging. Technology Institute of Enhanced transparency and competitiveness with live bid tracking, material procurement, and Technology, University of payment processing. Reduced project coordination time by 60 while improving decision-making efficiency and Moratuwa stakeholder collaboration. Email uthpalap@itum.mrt.ac.lk Development Tools Node.js, Express.js, React, TypeScript, MySQL, Socket.io, JWT, Tailwind CSS Phone +94 112124000 EDUCATION Tharukshi Adasuriya Institute of Technology University of Moratuwa 2023 - Present Lecturer (Probationary), Division of Higher National Diploma in Information Technology Information Technology Institute of Technology, University N/ Poramadulla Central College 2017 - 2019 of Moratuwa GCE Advanced Level - Physical Science Stream Email tharukshin@itum.mrt.ac.lk Mathematics C, Physics C, Chemistry S Phone +94 77 1902981
